title: Croatian Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender chicken, rich liver, and a blend of aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Liver
ingredients.notes: pork or beef liver as a substitute

ingredients.name: Stew
ingredients.notes: beef broth or water as a substitute

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add liver and cook for 2 minutes.
Add Croatian, Monsoon, and Xeriscent. Cook for 1 minute.
Add Stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
